3234480.name: Greengrocer Simulator 2024
3234480.description:
Greengrocer Simulator 2024 invites you to a realistic simulation world with colorful and detailed low-poly graphics. In this game, you'll explore all aspects of being a successful greengrocer, build strong relationships with your customers, and make strategic decisions to grow your shop.

GAMEPLAY AND FEATURES:

Realistic Business Management: Place your fruits and vegetables, sort out the spoiled ones, and keep track of prices carefully. Maintain good relationships with your customers by fulfilling their orders completely.

Comprehensive Decoration: Freely decorate and customize your shop. Use your tablet to manage your inventory, track upgrades, and grow your business.

Dialogue System: Engage with your customers through a wide range of dialogue options and act according to their wishes. Chat with others in cafés and bars and seize new opportunities.

Task System: Take on tasks from your superiors to advance your business, or make your own decisions with complete freedom in managing your shop.

DYNAMIC WORLD:

Explorable Maps: Discover surprises on the maps and find new opportunities to grow your business.

Day-Night Cycle: The passage of time affects the activities in your shop and people's behavior. Everything works realistically.

STRATEGIC DECISIONS:

Resource Management: Use your resources efficiently to expand your business. Adapt to price changes and market conditions to take your business to the top.

Consequences of Decisions: Every decision impacts your shop’s success and the game’s outcome. Plan your strategy carefully!

Greengrocer Simulator 2024 lets you learn the intricacies of daily greengrocer life while making strategic decisions to achieve success. Dominate the market, control the stock exchange, and become the best greengrocer!
3234480.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 土耳其语, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙
